document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate references invoice RB6604864 dated 2023-03-08. Invoice file contains invoice RB6604864 dated 2023-03-08 issued by SKF Eurotrade AB. Pairing is unambiguous.

rule_activation.lc_verification_note: No LC reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-23D-790178 does not contain an LC-related field label or bank term.

cp_consignor.invoice_value: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Corporate structure check - consignor name search in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: SKF Eurotrade AB found in invoice header on page 1 and footer on all pages. Direct match as invoice issuer.
Company name: 'SKF Eurotrade AB' matches exactly. Country: Sweden in certificate matches Sweden/SWEDEN in invoice.
Country Sweden confirmed via: (1) explicit 'Sweden' and 'SWEDEN' in address block; (2) VAT no SE556206761001 with SE prefix; (3) IBAN SE90... with SE prefix.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found in invoice header/footer
Country verification via VAT prefix SE

cp_consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN'. Company name 'SKF Eurotrade AB' is identical in both documents. Country Sweden is confirmed in both by explicit mention and VAT prefix SE. Minor address variation GÖTEBORG vs Goteborg is normalized. Direct match.

cp_consignee.certificate_value: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN
cp_consignee.invoice_value: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN (Bill to)

comparison_steps.description: Priority 1 - Check primary billing field (Bill to)
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice Bill to field contains 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN'. This matches the certificate consignee exactly.
Country Kyrgyzstan in certificate matches KYRGYZSTAN in invoice Bill to field.

rules_applied.description: Priority order - Bill to field used as authoritative consignee

cp_consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN'. Invoice Bill to: 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN'. Exact match on company name, address, and country. Also confirmed by Sold to and Ship to fields which all show the same party.

cp_goods_description.certificate_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS
cp_goods_description.invoice_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS

comparison_steps.description: Article number check - Certificate lists package numbers 439856569, 439885922, 439885955, 551092288
comparison_steps.detail: The numbers 439856569, 439885922, 439885955, 551092288 are identified as Transport package numbers in the invoice (page 5). These are package/shipment tracking numbers, not article/product numbers. The invoice uses HS codes (84824000, 84823000, etc.) and SKF part numbers (NKI 25/20 TN, 23052 CC/W33, etc.) as article identifiers. The certificate's numbers match the invoice's Transport package number(s) exactly. These are not article numbers requiring Priority 1 verification; they are shipment identifiers. Proceeding to Priority 2 for goods description text matching.

comparison_steps.description: Priority 2 - Controlled text matching of goods descriptions
comparison_steps.detail: Each product description in the certificate is verified against invoice line items: (1) NEEDLE ROLLER BRG → found on invoice page 1 under Slovakia; (2) SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG → found on page 1 under Sweden; (3) CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG → found on page 1 under Germany; (4) FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC → found on pages 1-2 under India; (5) DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM → found on page 1 under France; (6) ROLLER CHAINS → found on page 2 under China; (7) RADIAL SHAFT SEALS → found on page 2 under China; (8) LINKS FOR CHAINS → found on page 2 under China; (9) NUTS → found on page 2 under United States. All 9 product descriptions in certificate are identifiable in invoice with exact text match.

Certificate lists multiple origin countries in box 3. The invoice explicitly lists country of manufacturing per product line. Certificate does not assign origin per article directly, but the invoice contains invoice number RB6604864 and date 2023-03-08 matching the certificate's reference. The invoice's per-article origin assignment is: Slovakia→NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, Sweden→SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, Germany→CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, France→DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD>30MM, India→FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, China→ROLLER CHAINS/RADIAL SHAFT SEALS/LINKS FOR CHAINS, United States→NUTS. All certificate origins are covered.

rules_applied.description: Non-identity-bearing additions do not cause MISMATCH
Mixed origins - koppling vara-ursprungsland verified via invoice reference

cp_goods_description.debug_explanation: All 9 goods descriptions in the certificate (NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS) are identifiable in the invoice with exact textual matches. The certificate lists transport package numbers (439856569 etc.) which are confirmed as shipment identifiers in the invoice (page 5), not product article numbers — so Priority 1 article number verification does not apply. Priority 2 text matching confirms all items. Mixed origin coupling per 4.3.7: the certificate references invoice RB6604864 and the invoice's Country of Manufacturing column provides per-article origin assignment. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Numbers 439856569 etc. are article numbers requiring Priority 1 verification
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: These numbers are identified in invoice page 5 as 'Transport package number(s)' — they are shipment tracking numbers, not product/article numbers. The invoice uses HS codes and SKF part numbers as article identifiers.

cp_quantity.certificate_value: GW in KGS: 171,55 / NW in KGS: 125,20
cp_quantity.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight: 171,55 KG / Total Net Weight: 125,20 KG

comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains GW in KGS: 171,55 and NW in KGS: 125,20. Both are verifiable quantities with numeric value, unit (KGS), and category (GW/NW).

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 5: 'Total Gross Weight 171,55 KG'. Certificate value 171.55 KGS matches invoice value 171.55 KG exactly. Category GW matches 'Total Gross Weight'.

Invoice page 5: 'Total Net Weight 125,20 KG'. Certificate value 125.20 KGS matches invoice value 125.20 KG exactly. Category NW matches 'Total Net Weight'. Also confirmed by page 2 total row: 'Total 39 125,2' (Net Kg column = 125.2, which equals 125.20 after trailing zero normalization).

comparison_steps.description: Multiple quantity verification - both GW and NW verified
comparison_steps.detail: Both GW (171.55 KG) and NW (125.20 KG) are explicitly present in the invoice and match the certificate values exactly. No contradictions.

rules_applied.description: Forekomstkontroll - direct identification of numeric values
Quantity requirements - both numeric value and unit present
Weight category GW/NW explicitly stated in both documents
Multiple quantities - both GW and NW verified, no contradictions

cp_quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states GW in KGS: 171,55 and NW in KGS: 125,20. Invoice page 5 states Total Gross Weight 171,55 KG and Total Net Weight 125,20 KG. Both values match exactly. Both documents explicitly state the weight category (GW and NW) and unit (KGS/KG). No summation, conversion, or estimation needed — pure forekomstkontroll. MATCH.

cp_origin.certificate_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States
cp_origin.invoice_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States (Country of Manufacturing per article line)

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice pages 1-2 contain a 'Country of Manufacturing' column that lists origin per product line: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States.

comparison_steps.description: Normalize and compare each origin country
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate origins: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States. Invoice origins: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States. All 7 countries match exactly without normalization needed.

The invoice assigns country of manufacturing per product line. Each origin country in the certificate is present in the invoice's Country of Manufacturing column. Certificate has 7 origin countries; invoice has exactly the same 7 countries assigned to the product lines.

rules_applied.description: Origin identification - Country of Manufacturing field in invoice
Mixed origins - per-article country assignment verifiable in invoice
Normalization - all country names match exactly
Positive verification - all certificate origins found in invoice

cp_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 lists 7 origin countries: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States. Invoice pages 1-2 have a 'Country of Manufacturing' column listing the same 7 countries assigned to specific product lines. Each certificate origin country is explicitly present in the invoice's origin field. The invoice does not introduce any additional origin countries not listed in the certificate. All 7 countries verified. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Some EU countries (Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France) should be grouped as EU origin
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate lists specific EU member states individually in box 3, not 'EU' as a collective term. The invoice also lists them individually. Verification is per-country, not by EU grouping. All 4 EU member states are individually present in the invoice. No grouping needed.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-23D-790178 does not constitute an LC reference.
Document A is certificate file (1 page), Document B is invoice file (5 pages). Certificate references invoice RB6604864, which is found in invoice file.

Criterion 1: Certificate invoice ref RB6604864 matches invoice number RB6604864. Criterion 2: Certificate consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer. Criterion 3: Certificate consignee MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC matches invoice Bill to. All 3 criteria met.
SKF Eurotrade AB found as invoice issuer in header and footer of all pages.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignor company name and country verification
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Exact name match, country Sweden confirmed.
MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC found in Bill to field with exact match.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods descriptions

rule_evaluation_log.detail: Certificate references invoice; invoice provides per-article origin assignment.
GW 171.55 KGS and NW 125.20 KGS both found exactly in invoice.
Country of Manufacturing column found in invoice with all 7 countries.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Positive verification of all origin countries
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States - all found in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren SKF Eurotrade AB i Sverige, mottagaren MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC i Kirgizistan, varubeskrivningar (kullager, rullkedjor, muttrar m.fl.), vikter (brutto 171,55 kg och netto 125,20 kg) samt samtliga sju ursprungsländer (Slovakien, Sverige, Tyskland, Frankrike, Indien, Kina, USA) kan verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning av företagsnamn och land. Land bekräftat via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet SKF Eurotrade AB är identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Landet Sverige anges explicit i båda dokument. Adressen varierar marginellt (GÖTEBORG vs Goteborg, komma efter 415 50) — detta är tillåten normalisering. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN
sections.invoice_value: MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC, 210, Lev Tolstoy Str., 720031 Bishkek, KYRGYZSTAN (Bill to)
sections.rule_applied: Prioritetsordning 4.2.0.2 – Bill to-fält i fakturan matchar certifikatets consignee exakt.
sections.motivation: Fakturans Bill to-fält anger MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC med identisk adress och land Kyrgyzstan. Exakt matchning utan behov av normalisering. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS
sections.invoice_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – samtliga 9 varubeskrivningar i certifikatet kan identifieras exakt i fakturan. Blandade ursprung kopplade via fakturareferens.
sections.motivation: Alla 9 produktbeskrivningar i certifikatet (NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS) återfinns med exakt textmatchning i fakturans artikelrader. Numren 439856569 etc. i certifikatet är transportkollinummer, inte artikelnummer, och bekräftas av fakturans sida 5. Certifikatet refererar till faktura RB6604864 och fakturan tillhandahåller per-artikel-ursprungskoppling via Country of Manufacturing-kolumnen. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: GW in KGS: 171,55 / NW in KGS: 125,20
sections.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight: 171,55 KG / Total Net Weight: 125,20 KG
sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll – både brutto- och nettovikt identifieras exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger GW in KGS: 171,55 och NW in KGS: 125,20. Fakturans sida 5 anger Total Gross Weight 171,55 KG och Total Net Weight 125,20 KG. Båda värdena matchar exakt. Viktkategori (GW/NW) och enhet (KGS/KG) anges explicit i båda dokumenten. Ingen summering eller omräkning behövs. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States
sections.invoice_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States (Country of Manufacturing)
sections.rule_applied: Positiv verifiering – samtliga 7 ursprungsländer i certifikatet återfinns explicit i fakturans Country of Manufacturing-kolumn.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 listar 7 ursprungsländer: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States. Fakturans sidor 1-2 innehåller kolumnen Country of Manufacturing som listar exakt samma 7 länder med per-artikel-tilldelning. Fakturan introducerar inga ytterligare ursprungsländer utöver dessa 7. Alla länder verifierade med exakt namnmatchning. MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikat SEG-23D-790178 kan verifieras mot faktura RB6604864 utan avvikelser. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.
